repro: Simulated the risk-floor gate against GL1 pinned deliverables: hooks.check_risk_floor("routine", GL1_paths, plan/floors.json) -> ok=False, "diff touches paths floored at high; task profile is routine". GL1 (routine) must create app/models.py (floored high) and app/services/__init__.py (services/** floored high) per its pinned layout; floors are path-based/content-blind so empty placeholders still match. PLAN.md D17 ratified models=high AND scaffold=routine -> internal contradiction. GL1 is the root dependency; a floor bounce halts the whole firing. NOT among the operator pre-registered bounces (only GL10-seed was).

options.label: Re-ratify GL1 profile routine->high (minimal edit)
options.consequence: Breaks the same-plan byte-identical protocol for one task; GL1 then runs as high (3 validators, +heldout_drop step) and the floor clears (high>=high). Firing proceeds. Requires plan/ edit + re-ratification.

options.label: Accept as documented pilot finding; halt (same class as GL10-seed floors-always bounce)
options.consequence: Byte-identical protocol preserved; pilot #3 documents that floors-always blocks the root scaffold and the regime-routing lever (reserved for a later pilot) is the real fix. Firing produces the finding but builds nothing past scaffold, like pilot #2.

options.label: Re-ratify to move GL1 floored placeholders to profile-appropriate owners
options.consequence: Larger plan surgery (e.g. Base->GL2-critical, services pkg->its owner); keeps scaffold routine but edits plan/ + re-ratify and still breaks byte-identical.

recommendation: Operator decision required. If the goal is to BUILD greenlane this pilot, reprofile_gl1_high is the minimal, surgical re-ratification. If the goal is to CHARACTERIZE the plan under floors-always (consistent with reserving the regime lever for a later pilot and pre-registering the GL10-seed bounce), accept_documented_halt is the clean experimental outcome. I will not edit plan/ or weaken any gate input without an explicit ratification.

resolved.detail: GL1/GL4/GL6/GL7 -> high, GL10 -> elevated; plan re-ratified as instrument v2; resume GL1 parked->in_progress
